hermes-desc: Simple and leightweight translation projects and interlanguage links
hermes-duplicate-call: The #hermes parser function was used multiple times on this page; only the last call takes effect.
hermes-invalid-tag-name: Tag name $1 is not valid. Allowed characters are ASCII digits, letters, and the special characters _, /, ., and :.
hermes-invalid-project-title: Page titles starting with ! are reserved for translation projects, and must be of the form !xx:Title, where "xx" is the language code for a registered translation project.
